report.featureName: FUNCTION 40: MANAGE FAVOURITE LIST - ADD RECIPIENT FROM ACCOUNT NUMBER
risks: Error handling behavior is not documented.
securityConcerns: Sensitive data is present without explicit masking/encryption requirements.
uiDependencies: Add New Favourites via entering account number | Add Favourite - enter details | Tooltip tapped
1 | [X] icon | Close drawer and return to Manage Fav - Detail Group List
2 | [<] icon | Upon tapping [<] icon, system to navigate back to Transfer Landing Page
3 | Nickname tooltip | Upon tapping nickname tooltip, system to display the Nickname information drawer.
4 | [Next] button | Upon tapping [Next] button, [A&A] Secure2U will be triggered for authorisation.
testability: Flow details are missing, reducing scenario traceability.
Validation rules can drive positive, negative, and boundary test design.
Specification gaps and ambiguities should be resolved before automation implementation.
